entry.title: Multiple Header Creation in RAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts 

I need to create multiple Header rows on click of Action button in managed RAP scenerio. For this first requirement is I should be able to provide multiple values of single field using value help, for which I have used Abtract entity as parameter in Action button. But ONLY one value is selectable with value help.

Is there a way we can select multiple values using value help in action button click?

I see only while selecting entries in main list page with selection field we can use multiple values but not during action button click.

Action button click. Only single value selection

 

Main Selection filter, multiple values can be selected

entry.title: Bem Vindos ao SAP CLOUD ALM Implementation , session in Portuguese
entry.content: No SAP CLOUD ALM Implementation vamos mostrar de que forma o SAP CLOUD ALM, pode ajudar na implementação, gestão de projetos, gestão do ciclo de testes e gestão de transportes.

entry.title: Re: Customer Material (A2X) edmx cds import in CAP is not...
entry.content: Thanks, but what did you do to make it disappear?

entry.title: Re: Flow Builder Plus: the business insight, Part II
entry.content:
Hi @fadeevom 

Good point.

Simply, the FKONT determined by flow types. Flow type with 90* mapping to FKONT = 1, 80* mapping to FKONT = 2, 60* as FKONT = 3. Others are FKONT = 4. Empty means FKONT = 0.

We are now adding a separate page for Flow Type which contains the concept of Flow Type, Flow Level and FKONT and their linkages.

That official help documentation will available for public cloud release CE2502 and you can refer to it.

Thank you.

Best regards, Hongjun

entry.title: Enable Work Zone to Consume Business Solutions from Other BTP Subaccounts (content federation)
entry.content:
SAP Build Work Zone now allows for the creation of HTML5 Content Providers from any SAP BTP subaccount. In this session, you will explore how business apps can be developed such that they can be accessed by SAP Build Work Zone across subaccounts, enabling content federation for single-tenant and multi-tenant applications.

Speaker: Rupam Bhattacharya

Rupam has been a developer, technical consultant, and development architect, and currently is a senior product manager at SAP Build, focusing on helping developers make the most out of SAP Build Work Zone. He is very enthusiastic about AI, robotics and Lego.

entry.title: Re: RAP: Dynamic Fieldgroup Labels
entry.content: Unfortunately not

Thanks for the detailed blog.

I have followed the blog but somehow I am not able to receive the request payload from S4 to CPI.

Secondly,  the SuccessFactors url which was used in 1st package is not working for 2nd package.

Kindly help here.

entry.title: Re: All permission removed after adding common super doma...
entry.content: Hello, we are experiencing the same issue with permissions being deleted from a Role when adding a new permission. Have you received any suggestions from SAP or is there something we can do?

entry.title: Leveraging Decisions and Business Rules in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Unlock the potential of decisions in SAP Build Process Automation. In this joint session with SAP and Accenture, we delve into the evolution of business rules into Decisions and what SAP Build Process Automation now offers you. Explore various usage patterns for decisions, learn tips and tricks to create and deploy decisions, and discover how to integrate them into different applications, workflows, and processes. Wojciech from Accenture will a demo based on a real-world customer project. Finally, Sesh will discuss the future of Decisions, including generative AI and decision templates.

Speakers:

  • Wojciech Papuga, Accenture
  • Seshadri Ramanarayanan

Wojciech works at Accenture as an SAP developer, primarily on SAP cloud solutions designing workflows and applications (with SAPUI5) on the SAP BTP platform. He graduated with a degree in computer science from Lodz University of Technology, and in his free time is a computer gamer and F1 fan.

Seshadri is a senior product manager with SAP Build Process Automation, focusing on decisions / business rules, SAP S/4HANA extensibility, workflows/processes, and internal stakeholder management. With over 17 years of service at SAP, he brings a wealth of experience in business process management and business rule management to his role. Sesh has been a speaker at numerous conferences like Sapphire, TechEd, and bpmNext, sharing his knowledge in the area of process automation.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Considering login language as default, enhanced CDS view may look like - 

And the Data preview - 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP CAP: Error Starting Service After Deployment MODULE NOT FOUND requireStack
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We have a CAP services that is using a set of custom .js files.

We are getting the error below after deployment when trying to start the service.

"error":{"code":"MODULE_NOT_FOUND","requireStack":["/home/vcap/app/srv/utils/xmlUtils.js","/home/vcap/app/srv/utils/validationHeader.js","/home/vcap/app/srv/controller/validationHeader.js","/home/vcap/app/srv/edi-code-to-order-srv.js"]}

Odd thing is that if we execute the service from BAS everything works fine but not able to deploy.

We have an event handler implemented named edi-code-to-order-srv.js for our edi-code-to-order-srv.cds. Here we have an import of a custom .js.

const cds = require('@sap/cds')
const { executeHttpRequest } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/http-client')
const { validationHeaderControl } = require('./controller/validationHeader');

This custom .js has other requires of other custom .js and it is place within the srv folder.

Our package.json

{
  "name": "fof-edi-quote-to-order-njs",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "xxxxx",
  "repository": "xxxxxxx",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@cap-js-community/odata-v2-adapter": "^1.13.1",
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/http-client": "^3.16.0",
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/resilience": "^3.16.0",
    "@sap/cds": "^8",
    "@sap/cds-hana": "^2",
    "@sap/hana-client": "^2.21.28",
    "@sap/xssec": "^3",
    "express": "^4",
    "hdb": "^0.19.9",
    "axios": "^1.7.2",
    "body-parser": "^1.20.2",
    "dotenv": "^16.4.5",
    "fast-xml-parser": "^4.4.0",
    "fs": "^0.0.1-security",
    "he": "^1.2.0",
    "jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.2",
    "moment": "^2.30.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1",
    "@sap/cds-dk": "^7",
    "@sap/eslint-plugin-cds": "^3",
    "@sap/hdi-deploy": "4.9.5",
    "cds-swagger-ui-express": "^0.9.0",
    "eslint": "^9"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve"
  },
  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "cpqApi": {
        "kind": "rest",
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "cpq-quote-api-i-http"
        }
      }
      "[production]": {
        "auth": "xsuaa"
      },
      "db": "hana"
    },
    "hana": {
      "deploy-format": "hdbtable"
    }
  }
}

Any idea what can be happenging?

Many thanks in advance!

C.

entry.title: Re: Consuming Microsoft 365 API in the Cloud Application Programming (CAP) Model
entry.content:
Today (2024/08), you can just use a CAP Destination, to call the ms graph REST api without additional dependencies, if your are using a technical user flow.

There is still the destination limitation for the MS OBO authentication flow (see SAP BTP Bridge).

Sadly, to be able to test your service call also locally, you have to use a hybrid CAP scenario, because the OAuth2ClientCredentials fetch token is part of the destination service (only cloud) and is not working locally!

But luckily, CAP easily supports hybrid dev by binding the nessessary service using 

cds bind -2 YOUR-DESTINATION-SERVICE
and starting it using the hybrid profile
cds watch --profile hybrid
 
CAP is getting better each month 😉 
 
Regards Holger

entry.title: Re: How to create a handling unit in hu02 with external i...
entry.content:
Hi

We share a warehouse with a third party, so when we receive pallets with goods from this party we do not create an inbound delivery as there is no physical delivery. We just create the handling units in HU02. However it is the third party that creates the SSCC codes, so we need to be able to enter them into HU02 to identify them correctly.

 

It is a unique scenario, but if we could enter their SSCC codes into HU02 it would work.

entry.title: Re: BAS learning journey 'Unknown type undefined (com.sap.learning.Price) in ...'
entry.content: This is incorrectly tagged as "SAP Cloud Applications Studio"

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA - Embedded Analytics: Extensibility Process & Custom CDS View
entry.content: For more information, see the SAP Help Portal documentation under Custom CDS Views.

entry.title: Cross-Platform Mobile App Development Made Simple with SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Learn to create and enhance mobile apps for iOS and Android through a single code-line using SAP Build Code. This session covers getting started by creating your first app from the SAP Build Lobby and enhancing it in the Build Code development environment. Discover new debugging tools to monitor logs and network traces. The session will conclude by highlighting how you can build and ship your app to users using SAP Build Code.

Speaker: Bill Froelich

Bill Froelich is a product owner for the Mobile Development Kit within SAP Mobile Services. Building on his background managing, implementing, and deploying enterprise mobile solutions, he works closely with SAP teams, customers and partners to understand their needs and bring them into the product.

entry.title: Re: Caused by: EvalError: Refused to evaluate a string as...
entry.content:
This is most probably due to the preload bundle (Component-preload.js or library-preload.js) being generated into string which has to be eval'd at runtime. To avoid that, exclude the third party library from the bundle. See my other answer at Solved: HowTo use 3rd party lib with content-security-policy omitting eval()" - SAP Community.

If the issue still occurs even after excluding the third party lib from the bundle, follow my other Q&A How to Fix "String as JavaScript" Errors in FLP? (Async Module Loading) - Stack Overflow where I have summarized documented best practices for CSP compliance.

entry.title: Re: Caused by: EvalError: Refused to evaluate a string as...
entry.content: ok, Thank you..

The custom email works, but the Direct Mappings to the content of a MDF object are ignored / blank.

Is this a known issue?

entry.title: Re: Export Sales Process
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

as mentioned by Florent, please check the following solution processes:

  • Sell from Stock (BD9)
  • Intercompany Sales Order Processing - International (1MX)
  • Advanced Intercompany Sales (5D2)

You could also check the following documentation on “Registration for Indirect Taxation Abroad (RITA)”. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/baee0f4d00de4f1693be3f57...

In case this doesn't help you to answer your question, feel free to get back to us.

Kind regards
Johannes

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Monthly Webinar - August 2024
entry.content:
SAP Integration Suite is an integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) that enables the design, development, execution, governance, curation, analysis, and management of the full lifecycle of integration flows, APIs, and high-volume business events that connect on-premises and cloud-based processes, services, applications, and data across organizations. SAP Integration Suite is available on multiple cloud providers.

In this webinar, we'll have two sections:

Product Updates: Get updates on key capabilities and latest enhancements released for SAP Integration Suite.


OR

#AskAnythingIntegration: Our panel of experts will answer any questions you have on integration.

entry.title: Re: System table to view Remote Table Filters
entry.content:
Found my own solution, pasting here in case anyone needs it...

SELECT SCHEMA_NAME, VIEW_NAME, DEFINITION

FROM "SYS"."VIEWS"

WHERE 1=1

AND SCHEMA_NAME = 'EUK_SOURCE_TABLES'

AND DEFINITION LIKE '%MANDT%' AND DEFINITION NOT LIKE '%"MANDT" =%'

ORDER BY "VIEW_NAME";

entry.title: Re: Customer Material (A2X) edmx cds import in CAP is not...
entry.content: My bad. We switched to @Sap/cds-dk/@7 installed in the project instead of the global version (8).

entry.title: General Display Name Opt out in Second Half of 2024
entry.content:
General Display Name Opt out in Second Half of 2024

We are excited to announce the upcoming release for our opt out of General Display Name, so the employee name could be consistent globally in suite. Starting with the Second Half 2024 release, General Display Name will be enabled for all customers with the option to opt out. For the First Half 2025 release, General Display Name will become universal for all customers and the opt out option will be removed. 

 

General Display Name is release to customer two years ago. For now thousands of customers have enabled and been benefit from the feature. With General Display Name, customer can configure employee names that are expected to be displayed consistently across SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite. A new admin option, Enable adoption of General Display Name, is added to control it. You can see this option under Admin Center -> Company System and Logo Settings. The new capability provides both consistency and flexibility to managing display names. With the new capability, general display names preferred by employees are displayed in all interactions where a legal name isn’t required, while administrators and HRBPs can also access a person’s legal name whenever needed. For details how to configure General Display Name please refer to https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/adopting-general-display-name/ba-p/13536203
 
If customer has already enabled General Display Name, nothing will be changed. If customer haven't enable General Display Name but configured name format on People Profile, the name format will be used for General Display Name. For non-EC customers and for EC customers who haven't configure any name format, the system calculates the value according to message key COMMON_USER_DISPLAYNAME in company default locale, by default the message key is defined as a combination of first name, middle name and last name. If there is no full name, middle name, and last name, the field value is set to Unknown. To migrate to General Display Name, we need to run a job to generate display name according to name format configuration. That will be scheduled after new release downtime upgrade. Details please refer to below migration timetable
 

Migration timetable

Based on current release schedule, we will plan to run the General Display Name migration job as below: JobType: Manage General Display Name

If the job is scheduled, you can see the scheduled job in Scheduled Job Manager. Track the status of the job in Scheduled Job Manager, you could have better idea when the upgrade is finished. 

Below is planned migration time for preview and production environment

Planned migration period for preview environment:

10/12/2024 12 : 00 AM to 10/19/2024 11:59 PM

Planned migration period for production environment:

11/16/2024 12 : 00 AM to 11/23/2024 11:59 PM

 

Have A Question Need Support?

If you encounter any issues while testing this feature, please create an incident with the component LOD-SF-PLT-MNG

 

Next Steps

• Once the Preview environment is upgraded with the 2H 2024 version, review the employee's name and consider if name format need to be configured, and prepare for the changes in Production
• Review the release note and the latest documentation in the Resources section below in order to understand the features supported
• Review and subscribe to the Customer Community blog to stay informed of the latest information on the change.
 

Resources

Customer Community Blog
https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/adopting-general-display-name/ba-p/13536203
 
Help Portal
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/70097a1a469d47a0ae08809e4a240f98/ac31628b0f804c2689585b3aca96eed9.html

Migration Progress Update

Migration progress will be updated in below table

DateFinished DC

entry.title: Re: Error BDEF "is not a lock entity" during generation o...
entry.content: Yes, that's correct. You can add locallastchangedat : abp_locinst_lastchange_tstmpl; to your database table and use it as etag field.

entry.title: IDM user provisioning - Different SNC names for same user
entry.content:
We have SAP systems A and B in our landscape. Only B is moving on RISE.

A lot of users have access to both A and B.

After RISE migration, SNC configuration will result into a different SNC name for users in system B.

So, a user account needs different SNC names in A and B. Is IDM capable of handling this while provisioning users to backend SAP systems ?

entry.title: Re: B1 Sap error -5002: 10000100 - Document total value m...
entry.content:
Hi @mihamuro ,

I'm not a technical expert, but your XML looks weird to me, in the row level bit specifically. From my understanding, ORDN should have RDN1 as its line-level child, not RPD1 as you shared here. Hence, DocTotal is 0 as there are no lines feeding it.

I hope it helps.

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Object Manager: Using PA20 or PA30. Hit List
entry.content:
Old question but the answer should be that you can set a parameter that removes the searchresult so you start with an empty hit list.
Save your searches as favorites to re run the as neede.

TC: SU3
Tab: Parameters 
Add parameter: OM_OBJM_NO_LAST_SEAR
Value: 1

entry.title: BTP Trial activated but not accessible (for Fiori course)
entry.content:
I have started doing following course:
https://learning.sap.com/courses/developing-and-extending-sap-fiori-elements-apps

However I'm unable to start BTP trial, for one the link in the course is outdated and doesn't work,but I was able to find BTP section manually and asked for a Trial.
I got an e-mail containing a link and message that trial has started, however when I click the link it send me to a verification site which I'm unable to complete as it says that my number is already used, at the below of the page I can log in through Universal ID without an issue but I'm unable to get through the verification.
I'm stuck and I'd like to be able to do exercises for this course(needed for eclipse set up).

The mail that I got is on the same mail that I can log in through Universal ID. 
I made three tickets overall each sending me somewhere else to other part of SAP support, last one suggested here.

Thanks in advance.

When I am trying to upload the .mdf file using option ATTACH into SSMS but it is showing error as per attached snap.  I have taken a backup from same SQL server and same SQL SSMS and try to attach into same instance but it is showing error.

Nikunj

entry.title: Combining two availability check methods in AATP
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to combine Alternative based confirmation with  Supply creation-based confirmation in AATP? Say if a material is not available in a location then system will search in alternative locations ( location substitution). If it can not fulfill from alternative locations , then it should plan production and then confirm the order ( like CTP of GATP)

Nitesh

entry.title: Re: Huge Tag lag for 1 USER in accessing PA20, PA30 and PA40
entry.content:
Old question but the answer should be that you can set a parameter that removes the search result so you start with an empty hit list.
Save your searches as favorites to re run the as neede.

TC: SU3
Tab: Parameters 
Add parameter: OM_OBJM_NO_LAST_SEAR
Value: 1

Vielleicht hilft es, den Feldwert in der Ausgabe durch " einzuschließen. In etwa:

<field> = `"` && <field> && `"`

entry.title: BADI for SAP EWM after Confirm and save WT in program /SCWM/SAPLUI_TO_CONF
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement where I need to update my custom table after confirm and save warehouse task in program /SCWM/SAPLUI_TO_CONF.

I have tried using BADI /SCWM/IF_EX_CORE_CO_POST, which based on the definition "BAdI: Posting of Confirmed Warehouse Tasks" however when I tried to click on Confirm + Save button it's not getting trigger.

Is there another way to find this BADI, or can you suggest which BADI I should use?

Best Regards,

Tedi

entry.title: Re: Adding a new field(VEKP-SIGNI) in the additional data tab of HUMO
entry.content: Do we have any text field in HUMO transaction

entry.title: 🟠 Build Elegant Enterprise Apps for Android with SAP Fiori and SAP Build Code
entry.content: Learn to design and create enterprise mobile applications for the Android operating system. This session begins with an idea for an app and data, demonstrating how to apply SAP Fiori for Android Design Guidelines to design an effective and visually appealing user interface. Using Jetpack Compose and SAP BTP SDK for Android, we will guide you through the development process, ensuring your app runs smoothly across various Android devices and form factors. By the end of the session, you'll have a clear understanding of how to design and build robust, scalable, and functional Android applications tailored to your enterprise needs.

entry.title: BIT not generating from rated CIT
entry.content:
Hello,

My CIT is getting rated successfully but it is not generating any BIT. This issue started only since few days, before with the same provider contract i was able to generate BITs. I tried with new provider contract also, same issue. I checked in CC and my contract is present, and if i create any charge plan it is reflecting in CCM also, so webservice username password is working. I even ran command 'refresh_raters' in admin tool, but still same issue. Can anyone help. I also checked if there are any issues in BIT class and everything is correct there as well.

entry.title: SAP fiori embedded plus standalone FES
entry.content:
Hi all,

in our company we are working on a green field project were we have installed a lanscape S/4 Hana 2022 with embedded FES.

Due to new security requirementes we need to be able to segregate some Fiori app accessed via mobile device.

I need to understand if the installation on a standalone FES connected to the already existing backend can solve the problem ( by activating the odata and icf node just in the standalone FES). The final result would be that most of the APP are provided to the users via enbedded FES while some specific APP via the standalone FES both connected to the same Backend.

Another question is, in case the configuration is possible, do i need to create the user that need to use the segregated APP in the frontend system to add the related app roles or on both systems?

Thanks and regards

Federico

entry.title: Re: How do I set approval limits for users in S/4 (My Inb...
entry.content:
Hi

Unfortunately nothing from SAP, but we have found some vendors that sell solutions that have this functionality. Though we are still hoping for a SAP standard solution. 

Otherwise we will check the possibility to develop this ourselves. SAP has added some BAdIs that could be used together with a table or such:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/purchase-order-flexible-workflow-add-customizing-workflow-start-condition/ba-p/13432696

entry.title: SD_Partner_Update exception
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to test Device as a Service Scenario and for that i created bundle product with hardware and subscription product inside it. When i am trying to save subscription order i am getting exception of duplicate keys, on deep diving further i understood that exception is coming in SD_Partner_Update FM. When i am using hardware product directly, then from subscription order sales order is getting created. I am doing standard implementation only. So does anyone knows why is it happening. With same business partner when using hardware item directly sales order is getting created, but with bundle product exception is getting raised.

entry.title: RF: Verification profile settings for picking
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I want to adjust the fields for verification during the picking process using RF mobile. My question refers to the destination part of the picking process. The client doesn't need the confirmation for the GI-AREA as this is always the GI-AREA for outbound orders. SKU double check also not needed as they did that in the page before already. The only verification during the destination process of picking is the quantity.

I already tried to assign SAP default verification profile SE0005 which contains SKU, quantity, source bin location and destination bin location only to find out if the verification profile is considered in anyway during picking. Which I cannot confirm.

Does anyone know how I can adjust the verification fields during the picking process using RF mobile?

Thank you in advance!

Kind regards, Josefin

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
How to create the best planning scenario to retain planning flexibility in S/4HANA and DM
entry.content:
Hello SAP DM Community,

 

Our digital manufacturing team is currently working on various planning scenarios to combine the advantages of SAP DM with the planning functions of S/4HANA in the best possible way.
We have realised that if we implement detailed planning in S/4HANA and keep the level of detail high, the advantages on the DM side are lost in detailed planning and the flexible switching back and forth between similar work centres. This is due to the fact that we cannot change the production version and therefore the routing for an order that we have already released and sent to DM.

 

It is therefore no longer possible to switch to another similar work centre in REO at short notice, as the master data only knows one work centre that we have specified in the initial production version and we can no longer switch to an alternative production version after release.

 

From our point of view, the level of detail also decreases if we want to be very flexible on the DM side and want to switch between similar resources/work centres in REO, as we then have to work with pool capacities on the S/4HANA side.

 

We would be happy to discuss how you deal with this issue.

 

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Kolkata
entry.content: Looking forward to attend this event.

entry.title: Re: Which one is preferred: Adapt UI or Adaptation Projects?
entry.content:
Hi @RaminS.

entry.title: Re: Hybris C4C integration - Account 360 integration with SAP ERP
entry.content:
This is deprecated. Alternatives are the following features:

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/solution-guide-for-sap-sales-cloud/sap-erp-customer-cockpit

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/solution-guide-for-sap-sales-cloud/account-360-overview-of-customer-in-sap-s-4hana

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One MT messages
entry.content: Hello, B1 supports payment files that are saved in the database. You can define your format with EFM add on. Please, see more information on https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/products/entManage/sbo/implement/e_ep_sbo_bsp_efm.html. Kind regards, Ganna

entry.title: Re: Unable to build copied app
entry.content: I'm unable to build an iOS app it says 'Configuration error: missing text secrets'. It might be a similar problem.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Flow Builder Plus: When to use Liquidity Item Online Derivation?
entry.content:
In recent releases for both Public Cloud and Private Cloud/OP, there is one new functionality, named 'Liquidity Item Online Derivation', has been added to Flow Builder.

For OP customer, that configuration can be reached via IMG path: 'SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Financial Supply Chain Management -> Cash and Liquidity Management -> Cash Management -> Data Setup -> Define Liquidity Item Derivation Mode for Flow Builder'.

The configuration provides a company code based setup:

With this configuration, you can choose the liquidity item derivation mode with:

  • Derive Liquidity Item Online
  • Fetch Liquidity Item from table BSEG

By default, S/4 system treat all company codes as 'Fetch Liquidity Item from table BSEG'. And the liquidity item is derived for each accounting document line item during accounting document posting, and it will be saved into table BSEG directly with field 'LQITEM'.

‘Derive Liquidity Item Online’ offers one additional approach. Within this approach, system won't read the liquidity item information stored in accounting document line item, but perform the liquidity item derivation logic when building the flows, with Flow Builder.

This new approach is in favor of certain ECC customers who prefer combining 'Liquidity Item derivation' logic with 'document chain tracing' logic. In ECC era, liquidity item will be recalculated every time when building flows, and liquidity item won’t store in accounting document line item.

Storing liquidity item in accounting document line item gain lots of advantages, for example, it ensures an automatic processing, and customer can check the correctness of 'Liquidity Item Derivation' logic directly with checking the data (BSEG-LQITEM), and 'Liquidity Item Derivation' logic is treated as a prerequisite before run Flow Builder. But it also have disadvantages, that you have to perform one additional step to update liquidity item in accounting document line item (via program FCLM_UPDATE_LQITEM) after you changed the liquidity item derivation logic. If you forget to run it, the liquidity item will stay unchanged in both accounting document line item table and flows.

But it does not mean the 'Online derivation logic' is perfect, it also got disadvantages:

  • Rebuild step is still a mandatory unless you expect your updated liquidity item derivation logic impacts only the new flows. Instead of updating liquidity item in accounting document line items, rebuild the existing flows to reflect the updated liquidity item derivation logic is a must. If you forget the rebuild the flows, the situation is the same.
  • It will hurt flows' building performance. If you have a complexity setup of query/query sequence, it may impact the performance much more.
  • It will make the trouble shooting more complicated, and you need firstly identify the issue located in liquidity item derivation or liquidity item chain tracing.

So, when to use Liquidity Item Online Derivation? 

I will suggest to enable 'Liquidity Item Online Derivation' for the following scenarios:

  • You are ECC customers, and you get used to the ECC data build approach. Means, you will build flows with a periodically manner hence the 'Liquidity Item Derivation' can be merged into flow building phase.
  • You have a frequently updated liquidity item rule setup. Depends on the business needs, if the liquidity item per accounting document line item are unstable, saving liquidity item in BSEG making no sense because you have to rebuild them time to time.

 

For all other cases, I will suggest use the default approach where the system perform the automatic operations for liquidity item derivation logic, you will only manually change certain data via rebuild programs.

Finally, we understand that currently the two-steps rebuilding (rebuild liquidity item in accounting documents, then rebuild flows) is somehow the root reason for forgetting the rebuild. Maybe in a near future, we will reduce such rebuilding steps as 1, means, rebuilding flows automatically for those document items who got a new liquidity item.

Feel free to leave comment or contact me for better ideas. 😀

entry.title: Re: Possibility to connect multiple maintenance orders to a service order
entry.content:
Greetings,

you can use transaction IW40 to build a structure of orders. If it is not available in your system you would need to activate some business functions as described in the link.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-activate-the-functions-code-isu-in-transaction-iw40-pm/qaq-p/811213

You can use this functionality to build a hierarchy of orders.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "ABAP Core Data Services" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar ,
i have a problem with task 2.2 : create an association with /DMO/I_Overall_Status_VH to fetch the corresponding Text field.
My problem is that: 
The data source "/DMO/I_Overall_Status_VH" does not exist or is not active ztravel_cds.asddls /S4H_001_anavarro_en_challenge/.adt/ddic/ddlsources/ztravel_cds line 7 ABAP Syntax Check Problem

I think the view may not be available in your environment or the name may be different on your specific system. Do you have any suggestions for continuing the challenge?

entry.title: Re: Getting reference to if_ex_cewb_tsk_update
entry.content: I have activated this funktion and I am doing my error handling when CEWB data got saved. But how can I get information about selected item that I want to change and for which I don't want error handling? For ex. in table I_OPR_DATA . There is no indicator telling me which item got locked for change.

entry.title: Re: Need Inputs on how to download data into excel from a...
entry.content:
First of all: the # character you're seeing isn't really a # at all, but a placeholder for a non-printable character which cannot be displayed in the debugger. (If you switch the display of the variable to hex, you'll see that the hex value of e.g. a line feed character is 0A, whereas an actual hash character in hex would be 23).
So, replacing '#' with NEWLINE will presumably return a SY-SUBRC <> 0, because there are no real # characters in your string.

Now, to your problem. The way I understand it, you have an internal table containing something like this (whereas the # stands for a NEWLINE character):
string1#string2#string3
string4#string5#string6

And you would like to transform this into a table like this:
string1
string2
string3
string4
...et cetera.

Correct?

If so, I would first do this splitting in ABAP (SPLIT ls_tab1 AT cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline), building a new table, which then you download in a second step.

As for downloading tables as Excel, there's hundreds of examples here already, so I won't say any thing about that.

entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Customer Material (A2X) edmx cds import in CAP is not...
entry.content:
npm i -D @Sap/cds-dk@7
./node_modules/.bin/cds import --keep-namespace --as cds .\API_CUSTOMER_MATERIAL_SRV.edmx

Re: RABAX error on sap gui logon
entry.content: via RFC SM59 using other system

entry.title: Re: BADI for SAP EWM after Confirm and save WT in program /SCWM/SAPLUI_TO_CONF
entry.content:
Hello @acetedi 

That is the right BAdI. Most probably it is called in an update task. That is why you might have problems debugging it.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Query on recommended number of Business catalogs in a Business role in S/4 Hana Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are working on building roles for Project team for different workstreams, in which we need to combine multiple Business catalogs together in a single workstream specific role for each of the SAP Functional and Technical teams. We notice that for providing access, we need to add hundreds of catalogs in a single Business role. Would like to check on below points

  • Is there any recommendation from SAP on the maximum number of Business catalogs that we can add to a Business role?
  • Is there any limit to the number of Business catalogs that can be added to a Business role, as we were able to add more than 800 Business catalogs to a Business role

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Query on recommended number of Business catalogs in a...
entry.content:
• There no any recommendation from SAP on the maximum number of Business catalogs that we can add to a Business role.
  • There is no any limit to the number of Business catalogs that can be added to a Business role, as we were able to add more than 800 Business catalogs to a Business role.

But however transporting a Business Role with 800 Business Catalog takes longer.

And if you assign such a Business Role to an user the FLP also needs time to load the UI

entry.title: Re: Cheat sheet for URI patterns for calling OData actions and functions
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ,

thank you for your valuable blog.

Unfortunately, I'm facing a problem with a URL for an unbound function in an OData V4 service. For V2 service I managed to create a working URL. I would be very grateful if you could help me with this.

I have implemented an unbound function with RAP. My Behavior Definition code line:

Excerpt of metadata file:

According to your explanation abhove 

 I defined my test URL https://ourSAPhost/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zapi_whse_ipoint_o4/srvd_a2x/sap/zapi_whse_ipoint/0001/getDestinationsByHUContent(EWMWarehouse='AM01',WorkCenter='R1I1',HandlingUnitNumber='00000000003000000200')

But … it throws an error “Resource not found for segment 'getDestinationsByHUContent'“:

Can you help me find out what the error is in my URL?

Best regards, Matthias

entry.title: Re: SAP fiori embedded plus standalone FES
entry.content:
I would recommend to avoid that kind of solution, you will have one more system to manage and will not  improve very much the security posture.

 My suggestion is to use a WEBDISPATCHER installed on a DMZ to filter the traffic and allow only the necessary URL/endpoints. More info here: https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/en-US/48/9ac19148c673e8e10000000a42189b/frameset.htm

You can have the SSL termination at the WD. This will allow to monitor the traffic before exit the DMZ and reach the S/4 backend. It will increase the overall solution security, but at a cost of more complexity.

In front of the WD (public INTERNET) you should have a Web Application Firewall to block the most common vector attacks.

entry.title: Re: B1 Sap error -5002: 10000100 - Document total value m...
entry.content: Felipe, actualy it helped! Thank you for the help and сommunity сontribution.

entry.title: Multiple payment terms on a single Purchase order possible?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

               Looking for some valuable inputs on the following business requirement

  1. We have same supplier delivering both goods and services and setup as a single vendor
  2. Each material or services they deliver have different payment terms due to nature of service
  3. Procurement team creates one common Purchase Order to the supplier by including all materials with different line items
  4. Since payment term is at the PO header level we are not able to have separate invoices created using a single PO
  5. Adjustments are then happening during the payment cycle by posting invoices manually. Have this issue in Europe and not able to get a right suggestion on how to tackle this.

Regards

entry.title: Re: RABAX error on sap gui logon
entry.content:
The instance has been restart after the errors appeared? If not, plan a restart of the system and check if the error goes away.

Also, check if anyone changed any standard program by mistake...

entry.title: Re: product master categorization - Classification
entry.content:
Hi @luirojas 

 

With Object Dependencies you can influence what values are displayed depending on the value of another characteristic.

 

For class type 001 Object Dependencies is not possible but is when using a variant class  ( class type 300 )

and Variant Configuration

 

In S/4HANA Cloud we have a retail solution that involves Generic and Variants 

Please check documentation below and scope item  3I1 'Products for Retail'

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/64609d0ecac54654b0837cba34555b82/7a8d6754e90d8c4ce10000000a4450e5.html

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Calculate Current Month, Last year same month, Previous Month, YTD, on SAC Report
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

  I am facing a requirement where I need to calculate Input Month, Last year Input month, Previous Month, YTD all on the same report using SAC(as below), the source data is from Datasphere.

User will specify an input [Year/Month] at run-time. 

Please share your experiences on how to achieve this, thanks a lot !!!

entry.title: Re: Task 0 - Pre-requisite for August developer challenge - "ABAP Core Data Services"
entry.content: Task 0 completed

entry.title: Re: SAP webi formula to calculate the hours and minutes b...
entry.content:
Use the TimeBetween() function with the "SecondPeriod" and then convert it to the value you want (minute, hours, or days).

The example here is in hours and the correct answer is 4.56 hours.

v_Diff_Between:
=TimeBetween([Performed Date & Time];[Order Date & Time];SecondPeriod)/(60*60)

...

Hope it helps

entry.title: Re: SAP Unable to Preview and Save as PDF
entry.content:
Hi @zernansq ,

Have you checked the network/folder rights of this user? The whole path should be accessible, and read/write permissions must be granted.

I hope it helps.

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: product master categorization - Classification
entry.content: Object dependencies are not restricted to class type 300. They work as well for batch classification i.e. class types 022 and 023.

entry.title: SAP Integrated Financial Planning export job overwrite between two model
entry.content: We are using IFP from content and created export job on Profitability and OPEX model. Data sit in ACDOCP table in S/4 but even though we put a filter on FPA1 for their respective node ( 17 for Profitability and 18 for OPEX) data overwrite each other. Please help us in resolving this issue.

entry.title: Re: TM link between /scmtms/d_torrot and /scmtms/d_trqstg
entry.content: Hi William,
